RT @MainCaucus: Congrats to @RepMackenzie on the passage of H.R. 8897, also known as the 'Improving Travel for American Families Act.'

Mor…

As of Friday morning, Pennsylvania is under a “code purple” air quality alert — up from a “code red” alert on Friday — due to “very unhealthy” levels of particulate matter. As our region continues to see the impact of smoke from the Canadian wildfires, it’s important that https://t.co/XaZF710Psg

The people of the Lehigh Valley and the Poconos deserve clear answers and transparency when it comes to electricity costs. That’s why the bipartisan BILL Drivers Act — which I introduced alongside @repbynum — will give ratepayers a window into the causes of electricity rate

On #BumpDay, we’re celebrating pregnant mothers and raising awareness of maternal health topics.

For years, Americans have adjusted their clocks every spring and fall — disrupting sleep schedules, work routines, and family life. That’s why I co-sponsored the Sunshine Protection Act, which makes Daylight Saving Time permanent and ends the twice-a-year time changes. 

As a https://t.co/8NCI4nrNbc

As the father of two young children, I know that family travel is a challenge.
